rows.description: Composite of all PDI3_XYZ Factors based on Point-in-Time Risk Parity Weighting
Composite of all QPDI3_XYZ Factors by first equal-weighting factors within the same cluster and then weighting the seven clusters using PIT Risk Parity (see the original report for more details)
Composite of all PDI4_XYZ Factors based on Point-in-Time Risk Parity Weighting
Composite of all QPDI4_XYZ Factors by first equal-weighting factors within the same cluster and then weighting the seven clusters using PIT Risk Parity (see the original report for more details)
Composite of all PDI5_XYZ Factors based on Point-in-Time Risk Parity Weighting
Composite of all QPDI5_XYZ Factors by first equal-weighting factors within the same cluster and then weighting the seven clusters using PIT Risk Parity (see the original report for more details)
